item.title: OC COMIC DUMP- please help me save my cat
item.description: https://gofund.me/07f27b50 I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories and laughs for over ten years here on Imgur. I actually first became a comic artist here thanks to my fellow imgurians asking for more, and because of that love and support it started my official comic “ristay” identity. Imgur has helped me before and I’m desperately hoping they can help me again. Diesel is our 10 year old cat who has been loved and cared for his whole life, he’s also a big part of a lot of my comics. Within the last 8 days he has developed jaundice and has been seen by our emergency and local vet. Sadly they have no idea what is causing his sickness and are sending us to a specialist. His labs at least show he doesn’t have pancreatitis, but he does have some abnormalities that have left the vets baffled. X-rays showed no tumors or enlargement of organs either, but hopefully this specialist will be able to exam him closer. We were given three types of medicine and are trying to get into the specialist in time. so far we’ve had to pay $1,537 for his two vet visits. The specialist hasn’t given us a full breakdown of money yet but from what we have asked it can range from $800-$1500 for his first appointment with their further testing. We put a down payment already of $800. This appointment will hopefully give us a diagnosis and then we can go from there. Following appointments will also have their fees but we are praying to at least get the emergency visits and the medication covered. On top of all of this, our vet warned us Diesel might need to be hospitalized for multiple days while they do aggressive care. As we cannot afford this right now we have him home on medicine but if it doesn’t work he will need to be admitted. This is our biggest concern for when it comes to costs and why I decided to make the go fund me. I put the fund’s goal with all of this in mind but I don’t actually know what the final amount will be. I don’t expect to reach the full goal amount, just thank you to everyone who has already donated or shared. If I can have even a part of this covered it would help us so much. I’m hoping that we can ask for help. I know money is tight for everyone right now so thank you for even just reading this and sending well wishes. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. Go fund me: https://gofund.me/07f27b50 Second comic dump: https://imgur.com/gallery/uO7Gc2k
item.dc:creator: ristay

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
not much more
gross
did a flying insect make this meme?
disturbing
imgur is awesome, it's pretty rare for someone to leave a negative comment
not everywhere in america
real mature guys
looks like a place where nothing bad has ever happened
mmm hmm
we've all been there
i guess
dinosaurs would be cool too
beg your pardon?
dang
this explains so many things about my life
i brought him back
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: OC COMIC DUMP- help me save my cat
item.description:
https://gofund.me/07f27b50 I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories and laughs for over ten years here on Imgur. I actually first became a comic artist here thanks to my fellow imgurians asking for more, and because of that love and support it started my official comic “ristay” identity. Imgur has helped me before and I’m desperately hoping they can help me again. Diesel is our 10 year old cat who has been loved and cared for his whole life, he’s also a big part of a lot of my comics. Within the last 8 days he has developed jaundice and has been seen by our emergency and local vet. Sadly they have no idea what is causing his sickness and are sending us to a specialist. His labs at least show he doesn’t have pancreatitis, but he does have some abnormalities that have left the vets baffled. X-rays showed no tumors or enlargement of organs either, but hopefully this specialist will be able to exam him closer. We were given three types of medicine and are trying to get into the specialist in time. so far we’ve had to pay $1,537 for his two vet visits. The specialist hasn’t given us a full breakdown of money yet but from what we have asked it can range from $800-$1500 for his first appointment with their further testing. We put a down payment already of $800. This appointment will hopefully give us a diagnosis and then we can go from there. Following appointments will also have their fees but we are praying to at least get the emergency visits and the medication covered. On top of all of this, our vet warned us Diesel might need to be hospitalized for multiple days while they do aggressive care. As we cannot afford this right now we have him home on medicine but if it doesn’t work he will need to be admitted. This is our biggest concern for when it comes to costs and why I decided to make the go fund me. I put the fund’s goal with all of this in mind but I don’t actually know what the final amount will be. I don’t expect to reach the full goal amount, just thank you to everyone who has already donated or shared. If I can have even a part of this covered it would help us so much.
I’m hoping that we can ask for help. I know money is tight for everyone right now so thank you for even just reading this and sending well wishes. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. Go fund me: https://gofund.me/07f27b50 Third comic dump: https://imgur.com/gallery/G4aTBvi
item.dc:creator: ristay

item.title: What Happened Today #47
item.description: Declassified, defunded, dismantled. Trump wipes out war crimes data, slashes HIV prevention, and erases FTC guidance—while judges block his transgender military ban and EPA cash grab. Roberts rebukes impeachment talk, and Nebraska voters erupt over Musk, Ukraine, and Medicare cuts. If you're seeing this on social media, don’t rely on the algorithm. Stay ahead of the news before posts disappear. Subscribe free → govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Your links: 1. https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/trump-talks-putin-ukraine-ceasefire-good-chance-success/story?id=119890671 2. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/18/jfk-assassination-files-released-trump/82517699007/ 3. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/judge-blocks-trumps-executive-order-barring-transgender-people-from-the-military/ 4. https://www.npr.org/2025/03/18/nx-s1-5332274/judge-ruling-usaid-shutdown 5. https://www.axios.com/2025/03/18/justice-roberts-trump-impeach-judge-venezuela 6. https://apnews.com/article/social-security-fraud-waste-doge-elon-musk-212e3089951f731fd3f83443e104b315 7. https://www.ajc.com/news/nation-world/judge-blocks-trump-administration-from-terminating-14-billion-in-green-bank-grants/YCZPGIGJJNE6HKPZAJAMSCUAHM/ 8. https://www.mediaite.com/tv/karoline-leavitt-hits-back-at-french-politician-wanting-the-statue-of-liberty-back-be-grateful-you-are-not-speaking-german/ 9. https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/mar/18/trump-fires-ftc-commissioners 10. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/18/minnesota-senator-justin-eichorn-trump-derangement-syndrome/82523535007/ 11. https://www.ehn.org/trump-administration-moves-to-dismantle-epas-science-office-2671347926.html 12. https://www.washingtonpost.com/national-security/2025/03/18/trump-ukraine-children-russia-war-crimes/ 13. https://www.upi.com/Top_News/US/2025/03/19/Tesla-domestic-terrorism/4821742351566/ 14. https://abc7ny.com/post/transportation-secretary-sean-duffy-threatens-pull-federal-funding-mta-doesnt-send-subway-crime-statistics/16047073/ 15. https://www.yahoo.com/news/trump-administration-considers-plan-eliminate-204659563.html 16. https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2025-03-19/dhs-slashes-personnel-leading-fight-against-domestic-extremism 17. https://www.wired.com/story/federal-trade-commission-removed-blogs-critical-of-ai-amazon-microsoft/ 18. https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/national-security/trump-admin-considers-giving-nato-command-exclusively-american-eisenho-rcna196503 19. https://thehill.com/homenews/house/5202362-voters-boo-nebraska-republican-town-hall/

item.title: OC COMIC DUMP- help me save my cat
item.description: https://gofund.me/07f27b50 I have been a long time imgurian comic artist who shares her stories and laughs for over ten years here on Imgur. I actually first became a comic artist here thanks to my fellow imgurians asking for more, and because of that love and support it started my official comic “ristay” identity. Imgur has helped me before and I’m desperately hoping they can help me again. Diesel is our 10 year old cat who has been loved and cared for his whole life, he’s also a big part of a lot of my comics. Within the last 8 days he has developed jaundice and has been seen by our emergency and local vet. Sadly they have no idea what is causing his sickness and are sending us to a specialist. His labs at least show he doesn’t have pancreatitis, but he does have some abnormalities that have left the vets baffled. X-rays showed no tumors or enlargement of organs either, but hopefully this specialist will be able to exam him closer. We were given three types of medicine and are trying to get into the specialist in time. so far we’ve had to pay $1,537 for his two vet visits. The specialist hasn’t given us a full breakdown of money yet but from what we have asked it can range from $800-$1500 for his first appointment with their further testing. We put a down payment already of $800. This appointment will hopefully give us a diagnosis and then we can go from there. Following appointments will also have their fees but we are praying to at least get the emergency visits and the medication covered. On top of all of this, our vet warned us Diesel might need to be hospitalized for multiple days while they do aggressive care. As we cannot afford this right now we have him home on medicine but if it doesn’t work he will need to be admitted. This is our biggest concern for when it comes to costs and why I decided to make the go fund me. I put the fund’s goal with all of this in mind but I don’t actually know what the final amount will be. I don’t expect to reach the full goal amount, just thank you to everyone who has already donated or shared. If I can have even a part of this covered it would help us so much. I’m hoping that we can ask for help. I know money is tight for everyone right now so thank you for even just reading this and sending well wishes. If you have ever laughed, smiled or enjoyed my comics I beg of you to help upvote this for the fund awareness. Please and thank you from the bottom of my heart. Go fund me: https://gofund.me/07f27b50
item.dc:creator: ristay

item.title: Monday Phone Clearing Dump (Mostly GAMING MEMES) #431
item.description:
1. Hm, I think a lot of my tastes in women are formed by her
2. Drive safe home gamers
3. Sheriffs hate this one simple trick
4
5. GOAT pronunciations
6. NEAT
7
8
9. Joel tutorial video
10. Cats and mics
11. Raccoons trying to play Stealth mode
12. Good day for a swim
13. I love how accurate this is
14
15. Hey Imgur, so umm... I have an interesting update: I'm making a Release Date Announcement Reveal Trailer for Do Not Press The Button and a little know channel with a few subs called IGN picked up the trailer and will post it tomorrow for official world premiere! (20 March 2025). Stay tuned...
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Came over to the UK from the US to visit friends. I asked my airbnb host if i could metal detect their field while here. They said yes and I got a bucket lister ❤️ My first Hammered silver coin!! Elizabeth I Two Pence!!!! And some other cool stuff!
item.dc:creator: DirtFisher

item.title: Nothing ages you faster than hearing 1994 called “the late 1900s.” Time to start shopping for a rocking chair.
item.dc:creator: SkyPigeon123
